DECLARATION OF MICHAEL LAMAY IN OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES,SPECIALLY PREPARED INTERROGATORIES AND TO INSPECTION DEMANDS IN REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT PENOSOTES, ROBERT

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET #1) AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET #1 AND 2) IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. THE DECLARATION OF COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT DOES NOT SET FORTH FACTS ESTABLISHING THAT THE MONETARY SANCTIONS WOULD EITHER BE UNJUST OR WITHOUT SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $747.60, TO BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
